summary: Sequential scanning, richer menu bar controls, health labels, and scan-from-menu-bar.
introduced: Scan Macintosh HD button in the disk space menu bar popover
Live scan progress in the disk menu bar popover while identifying storage
Show DiskWise in Dock toggle in both disk and system status menu bar popovers
changed: Fast scans run sequentially to reduce system load during identification
Health menu bar icon shows Good, Fair, or Poor instead of a numeric score; numeric score remains in the app
System status top processes show application names only, without full paths
Dashboard scan panel shows folder progress instead of parallel worker counts
